paper_title: Ground-A-Video: Zero-shot Grounded Video Editing using Text-to-image Diffusion Models

method.background: Diffusion models have revolutionized text-to-image generation, but extending this to video domain faces computational challenges
approaches: Repurposing T2I diffusion model weights for video data training
Fine-tuning T2I models on single videos
method.challenges: Extending T2I success to video domain requires training on expensive video datasets

results.root_cause: The Cross-Attention layer is the single domain where complex semantic changes occur

title: Ground-A-Video: Zero-shot Grounded Video Editing using Text-to-image Diffusion Models
